styleBible.framing: vertical half-body emperor portrait, readable at strategy-game UI size
styleBible.rendering: painterly realistic, sharp facial design, detailed textile and armor motifs
styleBible.background: subtle dynastic atmosphere, no literal text, no modern objects
styleBible.negativePrompt: photoreal celebrity likeness, anime, modern uniform, text, watermark, logo, extra fingers, distorted face

visualIdentity.silhouette: upright imperial posture, severe shoulders, black-gold crown lines
visualIdentity.costume: black Qin imperial robe with narrow red and gold trim, lacquered armor hints under robe
visualIdentity.backgroundMotif: straight roads, bronze seal script pattern, unified measures

items.prompt: Original game concept art portrait of Qin Shi Huang for a Chinese dynastic strategy game, vertical half-body emperor portrait, black Qin imperial robe with deep red and antique gold trim, severe crown silhouette, jade seal, bamboo decree slips, bronze standardized weight, subtle unified roads and seal-script motifs in background, painterly realistic, strong UI readability, no text, no watermark.
